title: Landmark Paper Starter Pack
description: A metadata-only starter manifest for testing The Gauntlet on famous theory and science papers. This file does not include or redistribute paper PDFs. Place your own lawful local copies in the papers folder using the expected filenames, then run the result-pack command.
privacy_note: This manifest stores metadata and links only. Generated Gauntlet bundles contain reports, source snippets, anchors, and summaries, but not the original uploaded documents or API keys.

entries.title: A Heuristic Viewpoint Concerning the Production and Transformation of Light
entries.license_note: Metadata only. Verify source access and redistribution terms before sharing any paper file.
entries.why_include: A classic resolution-style physics argument with explicit mechanism claims.

entries.title: A Relation between Distance and Radial Velocity among Extra-Galactic Nebulae
entries.license_note: Metadata only. Verify source access and redistribution terms before sharing any paper file.
entries.why_include: A compact empirical argument with measurement-heavy evidence structure.

entries.title: A Mathematical Theory of Communication
entries.license_note: Metadata only. Verify source access and redistribution terms before sharing any paper file.
entries.why_include: A theory-building paper with equations and definitions that should be linked to claims.

entries.title: Computing Machinery and Intelligence
entries.license_note: Metadata only. Verify source access and redistribution terms before sharing any paper file.
entries.why_include: A famous argument paper with definitions, objections, and scoped claims.

entries.title: The Chemical Basis of Morphogenesis
entries.license_note: Metadata only. Verify source access and redistribution terms before sharing any paper file.
entries.why_include: A mechanism paper that connects mathematical structure to biological pattern formation.

entries.title: Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids
entries.authors: James D. Watson and Francis H. C. Crick

entries.title: On the Einstein Podolsky Rosen Paradox

entries.title: Gravitational Collapse and Space-Time Singularities
entries.license_note: Metadata only. Verify source access and redistribution terms before sharing any paper file.
